name: Skinsuit pen set
description:
Much darker and more magical version of the skinsuit bot. Huge dead dove alert, as you can steal identities at best and crush them at worst.
You can avoid use the pens you find too powerful, or get some of them later, as story goes. Some of them are meant to make everything pretty easy. Or just take everything and go wild. It's also up to you to decide how you got them - bought from a shady shop, ordered in darknet - or just found somewhere.
Bot has no strict scenario included, feel free to decide who your character is, how they look, where they live... You can also invent NPC characters. Explaining the setting in chat memory is useful to make bot imagine it the right way - modern city or maybe a fantasy land?

You better use a proxy, as these effects require some good imagination on AI side.
creator: SoftNeko
